hero.title2: DISCOVER THE HEART OF GUNUNG KIDUL
hero.subtitle: Explore the wonders of karst ecotourism, exotic white-sand beaches, and captivating cultural heritage in Gunung Kidul, Yogyakarta.

info.geoparkDesc: Gunung Kidul Regency is one of the regencies in the Special Region of Yogyakarta, famous for being part of the Gunung Sewu UNESCO Global Geopark, a UNESCO-recognized global geological heritage area.
info.visionDesc: To become a leading ecotourism destination in Gunung Kidul prioritizing nature conservation, education, and community empowerment.
info.missionDesc: To preserve the environment, educate society through tourism, and provide safe, comfortable, and sustainable travel services.
info.karstDesc: Known as 'Gunung Kidul Handayani', this region harbors ancient karst formations, hundreds of exotic white-sand beaches, and rich local traditions. TERRASEU guides your journey to explore this Geopark sustainably.

emergency.title: Emergency Services & Tourist Support Info
emergency.desc: 24-hour standby team ready for first aid, beach rescue (SAR), medical, and police support in Gunung Kidul.
emergency.modalDesc: Contact the emergency numbers below for medical aid, SAR rescue, or police assistance.
